genres: Space Exploration (Discovering vibrant new alien worlds and strange ecosystems)
Sci-Fi Comedy (Bumbling crew members, snarky AI, and absurd situations)
Cyberpunk Heist (Fast-paced sneaking, gadgets, and hacking in a neon metropolis)
Cosmic Mystery (Solving ancient alien puzzles and decoding strange signals)
Space Western (Rebel smugglers and scrappy bounty hunters on a lawless frontier)
Time-Slip Adventure (Accidental jumps through time, encountering fun paradoxes)
Sci-Fi Rescue Mission (A daring, high-stakes dash to save a stranded companion)
archetypes: Technological / Hacking (Overriding systems, slicing terminals, deploying drones)
Environmental / Tactical (Using the surroundings, e.g., shooting a coolant pipe)
Sacrificial / Heroic (Taking a hit to save someone, drawing fire)
Psionic / Alien (Using weird artifacts, telepathy, or unknown tech)
